MktCalcInsightObjectDef.expression: SELECT Order_Analytics_c_Home__dlm.Account_c__c AS AccountId__c, Order_Analytics_c_Home__dlm.Product_Category_c__c AS ProductCategory__c, 'USD' AS CurrencyCode__c, count(Order_Analytics_c_Home__dlm.Id__c) AS CategoryOrderCount__c, sum(TRY_CONVERT_CURRENCY(Order_Analytics_c_Home__dlm.Order_Amount_c__c, 'USD', 'USD')) AS CategoryRevenue__c, max(Order_Analytics_c_Home__dlm.Order_Date_c__c) AS LastCategoryOrderDate__c FROM Order_Analytics_c_Home__dlm GROUP BY Order_Analytics_c_Home__dlm.Account_c__c, Order_Analytics_c_Home__dlm.Product_Category_c__c, 'USD'
